name: vaipakam-lz-watcher
description: Internal-only Cloudflare Worker that watches Vaipakam's LayerZero V2 surface for security drift: DVN-set / confirmation drift on every wired (OApp, eid) pair, OFT mint/burn imbalance between the Base canonical adapter and every mirror chain, and oversized single-tx VPFI flows. Alerts go to a private Telegram channel — distinct from the public hf-watcher Worker which doubles as a competitive keeper surface.
